segments.text: Takes the hit, reads the getup, immediate fair!
segments.original_text: 攻撃を受け上がりを見て、すかさず空中前

segments.text: Reads that reaction too, straight to bair!
segments.original_text: らるの反応も、ふかりなし、空中後ろ

full_text: Going for it, but... Spring Takes the hit, reads the getup, immediate fair! Reads that reaction too, straight to bair! That connects!

corrections.original: ラルの反応も、ふかりなし、空中後ろ
corrections.corrected: らるの反応も、ふかりなし、空中後ろ
